# Release Notes Template

Use this template when creating a new release. Copy the relevant section from CHANGELOG.md.

## What's Changed

### New Features
- List new features here

### Improvements
- List improvements and enhancements here

### Bug Fixes
- List bug fixes here

### Technical Changes
- List technical/internal changes here

## Installation

Download `OneButtonMount.zip` and extract to your `World of Warcraft/_classic_/Interface/AddOns/` directory.

## Usage

Type `/onebuttonmount` or `/obm` to open the configuration GUI and set up your mount rotation!
